text.title: Auto Rollback Policy Design Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the auto-rollback-policy-design methodology end-to-end.

step.name: calibrate-noise-floor
step.input: Baseline eval over 7 days + per-axis variance
step.action: Compute ±2σ band per axis. Thresholds = max(2pp, 2σ + buffer).

step.name: design-canary-ladder
step.action: Default ladder 5% → 25% → 100% with 6h hold; tighten for high-risk features (1% → 5% → 25% → 100% with 12h hold).

step.name: wire-threshold-check
step.action: Implement rolling-window check; on breach, trigger auto-rollback in < 60 s of breach detection.
step.decision-gate: Test with a synthetic regression injection in staging. Confirm rollback fires within window + executes in < 60s.

step.name: ship-manual-override-and-logging
step.action: Add manual-override button with mandatory reason field; route every override to postmortem queue.

step.name: wire-post-rollback-runbook
step.input: Logs + traces + Slack notification + postmortem template
step.action: Auto-rollback triggers capture-state collector + Slack notify + deploy freeze + postmortem ticket. SLA 5 working days for postmortem.
step.output: Full policy live; first synthetic test passes end-to-end.
